channel.title: Home on jkt's blogs
channel.description: Recent content in Home on jkt's blogs

item.title: Dissecting HackTheBox Pro Labs: The Art of Attacking Enterprise Networks
item.author: Justin Kombe Tonguino
item.description: A comprehensive review of HTB Pro Labs — POO, Dante, Zephyr, and Offshore — with key takeaways, practical tips, and honest insights.

item.title: ArcGIS Web App: Overview, Common Issues, Solutions & Best Practices
item.author: Justin Kombe Tonguino
item.description: Overview, common issues, solutions and best practices for ArcGIS Web Applications — Experience Builder and Web AppBuilder.

item.title: ArcGIS Printing Services Made Simple: Frequent Issues, Fixes, and Proven Tips
item.author: Justin Kombe Tonguino
item.description: Overview, common issues, solutions and best practices for ArcGIS Printing Services in Enterprise environments.

item.title: ArcGIS Feature Services: Common Issues, Tips and Effective Solutions
item.author: Justin Kombe Tonguino
item.description: Overview, common issues, solutions and best practices for ArcGIS Feature Services in Enterprise and Online environments.

item.title: My Journey Through Cybersecurity: Degree, Certifications, and Hands-on Labs
item.author: Justin Kombe Tonguino
item.description: Should you pursue a degree, stack certifications, or dive straight into practical experience? An honest breakdown from an aspiring offensive security professional.

item.title: RH124, RH134 & DO457 - Key Concepts, Learning Resources and Insights
item.author: Justin Kombe Tonguino
item.description: Must-know resources and materials to get you started with Linux, System Administration, and security analysis.

item.title: Arch Linux Vs Pop!_OS: The Ultimate Guide for Developers and Security Experts
item.author: Justin Kombe Tonguino
item.description: A comprehensive guide to choosing the right Linux distribution for your needs — my personal experience with Arch Linux and Pop!_OS.

item.title: TryHackMe Offensive PenTesting Pathway — Full Review
item.author: Justin Kombe Tonguino
item.description: A full breakdown of the TryHackMe Offensive PenTesting path — sections, deliverables, and practical tips.

item.title: TryHackMe Red Teaming Pathway — Full Review
item.author: Justin Kombe Tonguino
item.description: A full breakdown of the TryHackMe Red Teaming path — adversary simulation, evasion, Active Directory, and key takeaways.

item.title: TryHackMe CompTIA PenTest+ Pathway — Full Review
item.author: Justin Kombe Tonguino
item.description: A full breakdown of the TryHackMe CompTIA PenTest+ path — planning, tools, recon, and exploitation.

item.title: Data Recovery on Linux Using ldmtool
item.author: Justin Kombe Tonguino
item.description: Recover your data safely from Windows LDM volumes on Linux using ldmtool and GParted.

item.title: About
item.author: Justin Kombe Tonguino
item.description:
👋 Who Am I?

I’m Justin (aka JKT), a driven technology professional with hands‑on expertise in ArcGIS Enterprise, offensive security, and automation scripting. I diagnose complex geospatial problems and deliver reliable, high‑quality solutions for end users. I author knowledge articles, support enterprise usage, mentor team members and resolve complex global escalations. Disciplined and curious, I continuously advance my skills through hands‑on labs and industry certifications.

💼 Work Experience

GIS Enterprise Support Analyst - Esri Malaysia (Mar 2025 – Present)
